After the defeat of Qilby and Rushu you became over-protectective and overthinker after 4 years later you start a relationship with your boyfriend,Percedal as he is still an Iop warrior with Rubilax as you are overthink alot and protective towards your boyfriend he wanted you to relax as you got jumpscare by Otomai in his bird form he wants both of you in the Sadida Kingdom immediatley since Ogrest caused the flood in every kindgdom across the World of Twelve and Amalia is getting arranged.

Your boyfriend excited about a new adventure but you keep began to feel anxious,feral and over-protective towards your boyfriend.

Difference in my Rewrite au:

Evangelyne is still a bodyguard and is a leader of the Cra arrow guards

Yugo is never a Eliatrope king and Otomai is still with his brother

Evangelyne took in as an orphan with Cleophee as Eva became Amalia bodyguard and grew up with her in the Sadida Kingdom not fond of the Outside world but Amalia want to explore out of the palace and forest home.

The Sadida kingdom with alot of trees with lot of vines, and tree houses made from roots and the palace is a big trees,have berries and fruits as food,flowers,ground full of grasses,full of villagers and guards.
